summary: Block 181 & 184 fixes verified: (1) Dropdown z-index fix - profile/notification dropdowns render above nav (z-[200000] > nav z-[100000]). Desktop and mobile dropdowns all visible with all menu items. (2) Feed pagination - cursor-based 'before' parameter working correctly, returns posts older than cursor timestamp. With only 2 posts in test data, 'you've reached the beginning of the hive' message displays correctly (hasMore=false when posts < FEED_LIMIT). All 7 backend pagination tests PASS.

issues: Discogs album cover images return 403 (external resource limitation, not app bug)

critical_code_review_comments: dropdown-menu.jsx line 53: z-[200000] correctly applied to DropdownMenuContent portal - fixes clipping behind nav (z-[100000])
Navbar.js line 64: Desktop nav uses z-[100000], dropdown portal at z-[200000] renders above
Navbar.js line 222: Mobile top bar uses z-[100000], same fix applies
HivePage.js line 451: FEED_LIMIT=20 constant for pagination
HivePage.js line 484-486: Cursor-based pagination with 'before' param correctly implemented
HivePage.js line 492: hasMore = newPosts.length >= FEED_LIMIT logic correct
HivePage.js line 824-853: Load more button (Diamond Glass bar) and end message display logic correct
hive.py line 385: GET /api/feed accepts limit and optional 'before' cursor parameter
hive.py line 399: Query filters posts with created_at < before when cursor provided
hive.py line 403: ALLOWED_TYPES filter ensures only feed-appropriate post types returned
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 181 (dropdown z-index) and Block 184 (feed pagination) both verified working. The dropdown uses z-[200000] to render above nav (z-[100000]). Feed uses cursor-based pagination with 'before' ISO timestamp parameter. Current test data has only 2 posts so 'load more' button won't appear, but backend pagination API works correctly. The frontend logic: hasMore=true when returned posts >= FEED_LIMIT (20), shows load-more button; hasMore=false shows 'reached beginning' message.

desktop_user_dropdown.details: Profile dropdown visible above nav, all 6 menu items shown (Profile, Settings, Orders, Honey Essentials, Help, Log out)

desktop_notification_dropdown.details: Notification bell dropdown renders above nav with z-[200000]

mobile_user_dropdown.details: Mobile menu shows all items (Profile, Settings, Orders, Honey Essentials, Trades, Log out)

mobile_bottom_nav.details: All 5 nav items visible: Hive, Nectar, Collection, Honeypot, Essentials

feed_api_cursor_pagination.details: GET /api/feed?before=<timestamp> returns only posts older than cursor

feed_api_allowed_types.details: Feed returns only: NOW_SPINNING, NEW_HAUL, ISO, RANDOMIZER, DAILY_PROMPT, NOTE

feed_ui_end_message.details: 'you've reached the beginning of the hive' displays when hasMore=false

feed_filter_bar.details: All filter pills visible: All, Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO, For Sale/Trade, A Note, New Feature

mocked_api_note: Resend email service is MOCKED for most platform emails
